title: AN ACT TRANSFERRING THE LOCATION OF THE SORSOGON SECOND DISTRICT ENGINEERING OFFICE FROM BULAN, SORSOGON TO GUBAT, SORSOGON, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9689, ENTITLED "AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE SORSOGON SECOND DISTRICT ENGINEERING OFFICE IN THE PROVINCE OF SORSOGON AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR"

chunks.text:
116 OG No. 35, 5487 (August 31, 2020)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11488, August 14, 2020 ]

AN ACT TRANSFERRING THE LOCATION OF THE SORSOGON SECOND DISTRICT ENGINEERING OFFICE FROM BULAN, SORSOGON TO GUBAT, SORSOGON, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9689, ENTITLED "AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE SORSOGON SECOND DISTRICT ENGINEERING OFFICE IN THE PROVINCE OF SORSOGON AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR"

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section 1 of Republic Act No. 9689 is hereby amended to read as follows:

"SECTION 1. There shall be established under the supervision of the Department of Public Works and Highways, a second district engineering office in the Second Congressional District of the Province of Sorsogon to be located in the Municipality of Gubat, to be known as the Sorsogon Second District Engineering Office."

SEC. 2. All other laws, decrees, executive orders and other issuances that are inconsistent with this Act are hereby repealed.

SEC. 2. All other laws, decrees, executive orders and other issuances that are inconsistent with this Act are hereby repealed.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

(SGD.)

ALLAN PETER S. CAYETANO

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate of the Philippines on January 27, 2020 and June 1, 2020, respectively.

(SGD.)

JOSE LUIS G. MONTALES

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary General of the House of Representatives

Secretary of the Senate

Approved. AUG 14 2020

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
